summary: Comprehensive regression testing of Temaruco E-commerce Platform after Email Marketing System integration. 24/24 backend API tests passed. All major frontend flows verified working. Fixed 1 critical bug in POD design page.

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: addToCart is not defined - The sticky Add to Cart button was calling undefined function 'addToCart' instead of 'handleAddToCart'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed onClick={addToCart} to onClick={handleAddToCart} on line 884

context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working. Email Marketing System fully functional with 6 tabs (Analytics, SMTP Settings, Templates, Subscribers, Campaigns, Logs). POD Guest Tracking System working with stateless design upload flow. Admin RBAC system working. Site Texts CMS working. All Products page with type filters working.

landing_page.details: All sections load correctly, 6 service cards visible, navigation links work

navigation_links.details: All 7 navigation links found and accessible (Bulk Orders, Print-On-Demand, Boutique, Fabrics, Souvenirs, Design Services, Contact)

admin_login.details: Login at /login with superadmin@temaruco.com / superadmin123 works correctly, redirects to /admin/dashboard

admin_dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with stats cards (Today's Orders, Pending Payment, etc.) and Recent Orders table

admin_sidebar_navigation.details: All sidebar links accessible: Dashboard, All Orders, POD Orders, Guest Designs, Enquiries, Quotes, Inventory, Analytics, Settings

email_marketing_page.details: All 6 tabs work: Analytics, SMTP Settings, Templates, Subscribers, Campaigns, Logs

site_texts_cms.details: Website Text Management page loads with editable text entries

guest_designs_page.details: Shows All/Assigned/Unassigned filter tabs with correct counts. Table displays client info, product, status, original/mockup images

all_products_page.details: Type filters work: All Products, Bulk, Print on Demand, Boutique, Fabrics, Souvenirs

print_on_demand_selection.details: 7 POD product cards displayed with 3 quality tiers (Standard, Premium, Luxury)

pod_design_tool.details: Design canvas loads, Upload Design button works, quality variant selector works, contact info inputs present, Add to Cart button works after fix

order_tracking_page.details: Track Your Order page loads with order ID input and Track button

boutique_page.details: Category filters work: Nigerian Traditional Wear, Modern Wear, All Items
